facts_disclosed: Cousin in Dallas says RE market is better — considering move

turns.content: been on the phone with my cousin for like an hour bro my head is spinning
Sounds like a heavy conversation. What were you guys talking about?
so my cousin khalid lives in dallas. hes been telling me for a while the real estate market up there is way better. more growth more new builds more everything
Dallas has been booming for sure — tons of people and companies moving in. What's he saying specifically that's got you thinking?
hes saying new agents up there are actually getting deals. like within the first 6 months. in houston its so saturated bro everybody and their mom has a license

That's a real concern. Houston is a huge market but the competition is intense. If Dallas has more opportunities for newer agents to break in, I can see why that's tempting. Are you seriously thinking about it?
thats the thing bro. part of me is like yeah maybe. but ismail is here. i cant just leave my son
That's the hardest part of any decision like this. Career opportunity on one side, your son on the other. Dallas isn't across the country, but it's still not the same as being right here in the city.
its like 4 hours. so id see him way less. right now i got him every other weekend and wednesdays. cant do that from dallas
No, you really can't maintain that kind of schedule with a four-hour drive. That's a huge thing to give up, especially at his age. Has Khalid said anything about the cost of living difference?
he says its about the same. maybe a little cheaper. but thats not the issue. the issue is my kid bro. wallahi nothing is worth missing his life

And that says everything about your priorities. The money and career stuff matters, but not more than being present for Ismail. Is this something you'd maybe revisit down the road, or is it pretty much off the table?
i dont know honestly. maybe when hes older and its different. right now he needs me here. but i cant lie bro the opportunity part gets in my head. what if houston doesnt work out

That's a fair thing to sit with. You don't have to decide right now. Houston might surprise you once you get into real estate here, and if it doesn't, Dallas isn't going anywhere. Khalid will still be there.
yeah thats true. inshallah it works out here. but its good to know theres a plan b i guess. anyway let me stop overthinking this lol
Not overthinking — just thinking ahead. Nothing wrong with knowing your options. Hope the rest of your night is less heavy than that phone call.
